verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We wait We're not in a hurry O we need You Lord We wait All our cares and worries We lay aside for You O how we long to see Your face O how we long for Your embrace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We wait We're not afraid to tarry We yearn for You Lord We wait For Your mighty wind to carry us Into Your presence Lord And as we fill this house with praise May Your holy fire fill this place

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And as we fill this house with praise Let Your holy fire fill this place
